raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Assembly will work with Senate lawmakers to deliver a package of retail theft and public safety legislation to Governor Gavin Newsom by June.",
    "The legislative bills aim to provide California with additional tools to reduce theft at retail stores.",
    "The Assembly's legislative package will create a new felony for stealing from a retail establishment with the intent to sell the merchandise.",
    "The legislation allows law enforcement to aggregate stolen property across different locations to charge felony grand theft.",
    "The retail-theft bills establish a retail crime restraining order for up to two years to address vandalism, assault, and theft.",
    "The bills will impose penalty enhancements of up to four-plus years for high-value property theft or destruction.",
    "The bills require courts to consider the underlying causes of theft.",
    "The legislation incentivizes diversion and rehabilitation for offenders who steal due to substance use or poverty.",
    "The proposed solutions are based on feedback from public safety groups, businesses, and community leaders."
  ]
}
```
